name: Request compile
purpose: Normalize request into structured run plan.

name: Runtime and asset preflight
purpose: Check object_info, models, nodes, workflow format, patch targets, storage, cost guard.

name: Base composition
purpose: Create initial image/keyframe with character count, camera, environment, lighting, and global realism.

name: Reference and identity
purpose: Apply character reference pack/IPAdapter/person masks where required.

name: Regional inpaint and detail
purpose: Use approved masks for local repair/detail passes.

name: Upscale and polish
purpose: Run final upscale/detail while preserving identity and composition.

name: Video handoff
purpose: Prepare approved keyframes and metadata for video runtime.

name: Audio handoff
purpose: Prepare voice, room-acoustic, timing, and sync requests.

name: Promotion manifest
purpose: Promote only passing outputs with full evidence lineage.
